bridge_equation_v31.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v31 = mix(B_plastic_v30, L_low, 1 - P_low, D_feature_v25, 1 - G_brain_v25)
bridge_equation_v31.structure_term: B_struct_v31 = mix(B_struct_v30, S_low, R_low, 1 - P_low, D_structure_v25)
bridge_equation_v31.readiness_term: R_train_v31 = mix(R_train_v30, B_plastic_v31, B_struct_v31, R_low, D_align_v25, 1 - P_low)

project_readout.summary: training bridge v31 folds the low-risk steady amplification layer into the rule system and checks whether rule risk keeps shrinking.
project_readout.next_question: next verify whether the low-risk trend survives once it is absorbed into the next closed-form core.
